title: LumenLedger Deployment Configuration
text:
Title: LumenLedger Deployment Configuration

The LumenLedger deployment profile is maintained by the Security team and is used by release engineers during production rollouts.

- Default Replica Count: 3
- Cluster Region: eu-west-1
- Auto-scaling Threshold: 85% CPU
- Rollback Window: 5 minutes
- Cluster Name: nt-prod-cluster-7

If the auto-scaling threshold is exceeded, the system expands replica capacity automatically. Failed deployments are eligible for rollback within the rollback window.

title: HeliosAuth Deployment Configuration
text:
Title: HeliosAuth Deployment Configuration

The HeliosAuth deployment profile is maintained by the Messaging team and is used by release engineers during production rollouts.

- Default Replica Count: 2
- Cluster Region: ap-south-1
- Auto-scaling Threshold: 70% CPU
- Rollback Window: 10 minutes
- Cluster Name: nt-prod-cluster-6

If the auto-scaling threshold is exceeded, the system expands replica capacity automatically. Failed deployments are eligible for rollback within the rollback window.

text:

- Primary Response Action: scale replicas to 5
- Fallback Region: eu-west-1

If the trigger threshold is sustained during a high-severity event, on-call engineers should execute the primary action first. If recovery fails, traffic should be shifted to the fallback region.
